goalsText: I want to get better at distributed systems and eventually lead a team. Prefer someone who can do weekly syncs.
Transitioning from backend to frontend. Want to build modern React apps and learn component architecture.
PhD in physics. I want to move into ML engineering and learn production ML pipelines.

Web dev wanting to move to mobile. Interested in Swift and iOS app architecture.
